# CTRubyOverhang.start

**Case**

The ruby text can overhang the text that precedes it.

## Declaration

```swift
case start
```

## Constants

- **CTRubyOverhang.auto**: The ruby text can overhang adjacent text on both sides.
- **CTRubyOverhang.end**: The ruby text can overhang the text that follows it.
- **CTRubyOverhang.none**: The ruby text can’t overhang the preceding or following text.
- **CTRubyOverhang.invalid**: The overhang specification is invalid.
